nodes.name: Gumroad Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives Gumroad sale/download events. Configure in Gumroad: Settings → Advanced → Ping URL → http://YOUR_SERVER:5678/webhook/gumroad-sale

nodes.name: Parse Gumroad Data
nodes.notes: Normalizes Gumroad payload into standard format

nodes.name: Paid or Free?
nodes.notes: Routes to different handling for paid sales vs free downloads

nodes.name: Kit: Add Lead Subscriber
nodes.notes: Adds free download subscriber to Kit with product tag

nodes.name: Kit: Tag as Buyer
nodes.notes: Tags paid buyers in Kit to trigger post-purchase email sequence

nodes.name: Notify Python System
nodes.notes: Sends event to Python Flask app for Sheets logging and Telegram notification

nodes.name: Telegram Notification
nodes.notes: Sends immediate Telegram notification for every sale/download

meta.description: Handles Gumroad sale and free download webhooks. Routes to Kit tagging, Python system notification, and Telegram alerts.
meta.setup_notes: 1. Set KIT_API_SECRET env var in n8n. 2. Set TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID env var. 3. In Gumroad: Settings → Advanced → Ping URL → http://YOUR_SERVER:5678/webhook/gumroad-sale
